subject: A hooded warrior standing beside a large armored bird-creature (chocobo with mechanical red helmet and golden plumage)
description: A figure in a red hood and gold shoulder pauldron stands in three-quarter view beside a massive bird-creature. The creature wears an ornate mechanical red helmet with a golden eye-lens and gear motifs, and its body is covered in dense golden-yellow plumage. The humanoid figure leans slightly toward the creature in a paired, composed stance. The background is a muted teal-green suggesting an outdoor setting. The pairing of rider and armored chocobo gives the composition a military companion feel.
foreground: Hooded warrior in red hood and gold pauldron alongside an armored chocobo
background: Muted teal-green environment, indeterminate foliage or terrain
emotion: composed, ready — warrior at ease but alert beside a loyal mount
